title: Settings
subtitle: Local display settings are saved on this device. App defaults are config-backed and read-only here.
languageHelp: Applies immediately and persists after restart.
aboutDescription: Free and open-source local visual reference manager.
displayOnlyThumbnail: Display only, used by Sharp thumbnail generation.
displayOnlyImportPolicy: Display only. The MVP imports by copying into the library.
displayOnlyImportFlow: Display only, currently used by the import flow.
knownIssues: Known issues: video thumbnails need optional external FFmpeg; rich audio/video playback is not included.
ffmpegOptional: FFmpeg is optional, external, and not bundled with the app.

shortcuts.toggle: Add or remove an asset from the selection.
shortcuts.escape: Clear selection or close a modal.
shortcuts.delete: Move selected active assets to trash.
shortcuts.viewerNavigation: Move to the previous or next asset in the viewer.
